events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: Ringo Starr, legendary drummer for The Beatles, celebrates his 86th birthday.

angles.name: Ringo's Beat
angles.copy: Eighty-six years young! Sending big birthday wishes to the one and only Ringo Starr. What's your favourite Beatles track featuring Ringo on drums?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the legendary Brian May! From Queen anthems to his incredible solo work, what's your favourite Brian May guitar moment?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman Mick Jagger celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Jagger's Joy
angles.copy: Still got the moves! Wishing a very happy 83rd birthday to the one and only Mick Jagger. What's your favourite Stones track to get you dancing?

events.title: MTV launched (1981)
events.blurb: MTV, the first 24-hour music video channel, launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first broadcast.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: On this day in 1981, MTV launched, kicking off with 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. Did you catch it when it first aired, or did you hear about it on the radio?

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' remembered
events.blurb: Oasis released their iconic debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Day
angles.copy: Remembering the album that launched a thousand singalongs. Oasis's 'Definitely Maybe' dropped in '94. What's your favourite track from this Britpop masterpiece?

events.title: Woodstock Festival (1969)
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair took place from August 15-18, 1969, featuring iconic performances over three days of peace and music.

angles.name: Peace & Music
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago, Woodstock brought together half a million people for 'three days of peace and music'. Which legendary performance do you wish you'd seen live?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's Death
events.blurb: Today marks 49 years since the passing of the King of Rock 'n' Roll, Elvis Presley, on August 16, 1977.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: Forty-nine years today, we lost the King. Elvis Presley's legacy lives on. What's your go-to Elvis track?

events.title: Tupac Shakur Remembered
events.blurb: We remember Tupac Shakur, who was shot in Las Vegas on September 7, 1996, and passed away on September 13, 1996.

angles.name: Tupac's Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering the profound impact of Tupac Shakur. His music and message continue to resonate decades later. What's your favourite Tupac track?

events.title: Jimi Hendrix Remembered
events.blurb: We remember rock legend Jimi Hendrix, who passed away on September 18, 1970.

angles.name: Hendrix Forever
angles.copy: Remembering the incomparable Jimi Hendrix today. His revolutionary guitar playing changed music forever. Which Hendrix track is your all-time favourite?

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' remembered
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic album 'Abbey Road' on September 26, 1969, in the UK.

angles.name: Abbey Road Vibe
angles.copy: Taking a trip down Abbey Road today. The Beatles' legendary album dropped in '69. What's the standout track for you?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: Chrissie Hynde, lead singer of The Pretenders, celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Pretenders Power
angles.copy: Happy 75th Birthday to the iconic Chrissie Hynde! Her voice and style are unmistakable. What's your favourite Pretenders hit?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Liam Gallagher, the distinctive voice of Oasis and a successful solo artist, celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Mad for Liam
angles.copy: Happy 54th Birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! From Oasis anthems to his solo bangers, what's your top track from the man himself?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' remembered
events.blurb: John Lennon released his iconic song 'Imagine' in 1971.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: On this day, we reflect on John Lennon's timeless message of peace with 'Imagine', released in 1971. What does this song mean to you?

events.title: First iPod released (2001)
events.blurb: Apple released the very first iPod on October 23, 2001, changing music consumption forever.

angles.name: iPod Revolution
angles.copy: Twenty-five years ago, the first iPod dropped, putting '1,000 songs in your pocket'. Did you have one of the originals? What was the first album you loaded on?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: James Bond Day celebrates the release of the first 007 film, 'Dr. No', on October 5, 1962.

angles.name: Bond, James Bond
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Celebrating 007's cinematic debut. Who's your favourite Bond, and what's the best Bond theme tune?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering John Lennon, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Lennon's Legacy
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the visionary John Lennon. His music continues to inspire generations. What's your favourite Lennon lyric?
